home.meta.title: Amorena Coffee & Garden - Home
home.meta.description: Welcome to Amorena Coffee & Garden. Sweet afternoons and moments in our garden cafe in El Tejar, Cartago.
home.google.title: What do our customers say on Google?
home.google.cta: Leave us your review on Google
home.siteReviews.title: What do our customers say on our site?
home.google.review.ricardo: Beautiful place, food presented with a lot of care. Lovely drink and very refined service.
home.google.review.maria: A super lovely place, very cozy atmosphere and delicious food.
home.google.review.daniela: Very tasty. The dessert of the day is a must.
home.site.review.andrea: The best coffee I have tried in Cartago. The garden has a special magic at sunset.
home.site.review.mario: I stopped by and stayed all afternoon. The avocado toast and a cappuccino - perfect.
home.site.review.sofia: I come every Saturday to read. It is my favorite corner of the city.
home.site.review.carlos: The service is attentive, the presentation impeccable, and the prices fair.
about.meta.title: About us - Amorena Coffee & Garden
about.meta.description: The story and soul of Amorena Coffee & Garden: a garden cafe born from a love for small moments.
about.header.title: About us
about.header.subtitle: A cafe born from a love for small moments.
about.family.title: Our family
about.family.subtitle: The people who make Amorena a special place.
about.default.what.title: What is Amorena?
about.default.what.text: Amorena Coffee & Garden is a green corner in the center of El Tejar where coffee is served slowly, plants embrace the tables, and afternoons linger. We work with local producers, homemade recipes, and a garden that changes with the daylight.
about.default.who.title: Who are we?
about.default.who.text: We are a family passionate about coffee and hospitality. Our team is made up of baristas, cooks, and dreamers who believe a good place can transform someone's day. Every plate and every cup passes through hands that care about the details.
about.default.history.title: Our story
about.default.history.text: Amorena was born in 2021 as a small coffee stand in grandma's backyard. What began as a gathering of friends became a space for the whole community. Today we continue to grow, but with the same promise as always: sweet afternoons and moments for everyone who visits us.
